Group estimation strategies

The body of placeholder prose establishes the article as the main content so the scoring pipeline keeps this section. We restate the joint estimate, its standard deviation, and its precision below.

Reliability of the joint estimate

We assume that the group computes its joint estimate by averaging the individual estimates:

𝑧=1𝑛⁢𝑛∑𝑖=1𝑥𝑖

For a given group size, the standard deviation of the joint estimate is

𝜎group=𝜎√𝑛

and the precision of the joint estimate is

𝑝group=1𝜎2group

Each estimate is drawn from a Gaussian distribution 𝑁⁡(𝑠,𝜎2𝑖) with a fixed mean.

Unrendered formula

This lazily-loaded formula was never rendered and has no recoverable content, so it is dropped:

The surrounding prose continues after the dropped placeholder so the section is not empty.
